hero.headline: Fullstack developer based in Sukabumi. I build web apps, dashboards, tools and backend systems with practical execution.
hero.body: I work across frontend, backend, dashboards, APIs, and practical IT support. My focus is turning unclear operational problems into reliable tools that are easy to use, maintain, and improve.

stats.label: Support
stats.value: Technical IT help and IT support

services.title: Web development
services.description: Building responsive websites and web applications with clean structure, maintainable code, and practical user flows.

services.title: Frontend implementation
services.description: Turning interfaces into polished, responsive, production-ready frontend experiences with attention to detail and usability.

services.title: Dashboards
services.description: Designing and developing dashboards for operational data, monitoring, reporting, and repeated daily workflows.

services.title: Internal tools
services.description: Creating focused tools that reduce manual work, organize information, and help teams move faster.

services.title: API and backend
services.description: Building backend features, API integrations, data flows, and server-side logic that support reliable applications.

services.title: Technical IT help
services.description: Providing practical IT support, troubleshooting, setup assistance, and technical guidance for teams and individuals.

testimonials.quote: I care about building systems that are useful in real work, not just polished in screenshots.
testimonials.author: Akmal Zaidan

testimonials.quote: The best tools are clear, reliable, and easy for people to keep using after handoff.
testimonials.author: Akmal Zaidan
